//: Provider selects the LLM backend: AzureOpenAI | OpenAI | Ollama.

OpenAI.//Endpoint: Optional. Leave empty for official OpenAI. For OpenAI-compatible providers set a base URL, e.g. Zhipu(free): https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4 ; Qwen(DashScope): https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 ; DeepSeek: https://api.deepseek.com/v1

//Carriers: Optional. If EasyPost.ApiKey is set, live multi-carrier rates are used; otherwise built-in mock carriers are used. Use an EasyPost TEST key (EZTK...) for free deterministic test rates: https://www.easypost.com/account/api-keys
//Printer: ZPL label printing. Type: Windows (print via spooler by Name) | Tcp (send to Host:Port, default 9100) | None (write file only).
